Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing for InfoWatch TM accounts

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Password bruteforcing attempts from host {src.host} for account "{subject.account.name}" in application {event_src.title} on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {datafield1}.
Successful password bruteforcing from host {src.host} for account "{subject.account.name}" in application {event_src.title} on host {event_src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {datafield1}.
